data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the fill mode set to FCFS claim, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement. The prior steps focus on creating resources, offers, and bookings, but do not include any checks or records of the fill mode or staffing demand rows. This indicates a gap in the necessary data to confirm the requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of the fill mode being set to FCFS claim.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the fill mode setting.
